title: phlox peckii
intro: Phlox peckii, also known as the Woodland Phlox, is a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phlox peckii include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and soothing respiratory tract infections. Herbal preparations of Phlox peckii typically involve drying and infusing the flowers in hot water to make a tea or decoction, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
